description_long: This office building is a tall, rectangular structure with a dark facade and a grid of evenly spaced square windows running vertically along its height. The upper portion of the building features a slightly protruding section with horizontal accent lines, giving it a distinct cap-like appearance. The windows are arranged in a highly regular, repetitive pattern, contributing to a sense of order and modernity. The exterior appears to be clad in dark materials, possibly concrete or metal panels, with a matte finish. There are no visible entrances, signage, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and utilitarian design. The overall impression is of a modern, high-rise office tower suitable for dense urban environments.
description: A tall, dark, rectangular office building with a grid of square windows and a minimalist, modern design. The upper section features horizontal accent lines and a cap-like protrusion.
description_view_0: Front view shows the grid of square windows and the prominent cap-like top section with horizontal lines.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with the same window grid and cap, but lighting and window reflections differ slightly.
description_view_2: Rear view maintains the window grid and cap, with subtle differences in window illumination and shadowing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the front and other side, with consistent window arrangement and cap details.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniform grid of square windows, evenly spaced in vertical and horizontal rows across all facades.
